name: Marital Settlement Agreement (Uncontested Divorce)
description: A legal protocol where spouses agree on the terms of their divorce, including asset division, child custody, and support.
content:
MARITAL SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT

THE PARTIES:
1- Spouse 1: {{spouse_1_name}} (ID/SSN: {{spouse_1_id}})
2- Spouse 2: {{spouse_2_name}} (ID/SSN: {{spouse_2_id}})

The Parties identified above, having decided to dissolve their marriage by mutual consent due to irreconcilable differences, hereby agree to settle all rights, obligations, and financial matters arising from their marriage as follows:

1. DIVORCE: Both Parties mutually consent to an uncontested divorce and agree to execute all necessary documents to effectuate the dissolution of their marriage.

2. CHILD CUSTODY & VISITATION: {{#if (eq has_children 'Yes')}}The Parties share minor child(ren). Sole/Primary legal and physical custody shall be awarded to {{custody_details}}. The non-custodial parent shall have reasonable visitation rights as agreed upon by the Parties or determined by the court.{{else}}The Parties have no minor children together.{{/if}}

3. SPOUSAL & CHILD SUPPORT (ALIMONY): {{#if (eq alimony_applies 'Yes')}}{{alimony_payer}} agrees to pay the other party the sum of {{alimony_amount}} per month for spousal and/or child support.{{else}}Both Parties hereby waive any right to claim spousal support (alimony) from the other, now and in the future.{{/if}}

4. DIVISION OF ASSETS & DEBTS:

{{asset_debt_division}}

Except as explicitly stated above, each Party shall retain full ownership of any personal property, bank accounts, and vehicles currently in their possession. The Parties waive any further claims to each other's current or future assets.

5. LEGAL FEES: Each Party shall be responsible for their own legal fees and court costs associated with this divorce proceeding.

This Agreement contains the entire understanding of the Parties. It has been read, understood, and signed voluntarily and without coercion on {{formatDate agreement_date}}.

{{spouse_1_name}}


Signature: ________________

{{spouse_2_name}}


Signature: ________________

fields.name: has_children
fields.label: Do the parties have minor children?

fields.name: alimony_payer
fields.label: Who will pay the support? (If Yes)

fields.name: asset_debt_division
fields.label: Division of Assets and Debts
fields.placeholder: Detail who gets the house, cars, and who pays which debts.
